subject: Warp Threshold_picks Question
body:
Hello again,

For the threshold_picks command, what exactly is being used as a threshold 
to determine what particles are included or excluded?  I assume its using 
some physical property (like how well it matches a template) but its not 
specified in the tutorial and I haven't been able to find searching 
around.  I really just want to know so I have a better idea of why 
particles are being excluded when I input a number.

Thank you,
Kyle
